# workflows

CI/CD workflows. ci.yml (main pipeline: unit + UI tests), release.yml (signing, notarization, DMG upload), nightly.yml (nightly builds), test-e2e.yml (E2E automation), build-ghosttykit.yml (xcframework compilation), update-homebrew.yml (cask formula update), ci-macos-compat.yml (OS version compat), claude.yml (agent-triggered).
